<domain>
## Phase Boundary

All 114 tools have correct API paths and a unit test that asserts the exact HTTP method, URL path, and request body shape. Every incorrect path identified in Phase 2 is fixed in source. The storefront category browsing tool, checkout/checkin tools, and invoice lifecycle tools all call their correct spec-confirmed endpoints.

</domain>
